assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses useQuery({ queryKey, queryFn }) object syntax
assertions.without_skill_reason: Also uses object syntax — this is well-known in general knowledge

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses ['todos', filter] array key
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses ['todos', filter] array key

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses isPending with explicit comment about v5 distinction from isLoading
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses isLoading instead of isPending

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses gcTime with comment about v5 rename from cacheTime
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses cacheTime (v4 name)

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses throwOnError with comment about v5 rename
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses useErrorBoundary (v4 name)

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses placeholderData: keepPreviousData with import
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses keepPreviousData: true (v4 syntax)

assertions.with_skill_reason: Does not use onSuccess; uses useEffect with comment about v5 removal
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses onSuccess callback which was removed in v5

assertions.with_skill_reason: Includes initialPageParam: 0 with comment that it's required in v5
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses pageParam = 0 default in queryFn instead of initialPageParam option

assertions.with_skill_reason: Explicitly warns against enabled on useSuspenseQuery; uses conditional rendering
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses enabled: isLoggedIn on useSuspenseQuery

assertions.with_skill_reason: Explicitly warns against conditional rendering on fetchStatus with useSuspenseQuery
assertions.without_skill_reason: Conditionally renders based on fetchStatus === 'fetching' with useSuspenseQuery

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses queryClient.invalidateQueries in onSuccess
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses queryClient.invalidateQueries in onSuccess

assertions.with_skill_reason: Explicitly documents need for retryOnMount: false alongside refetchOnMount: false
assertions.without_skill_reason: Only uses refetchOnMount: false without retryOnMount: false

assertions.with_skill_reason: Passes signal to fetch in queryFn
assertions.without_skill_reason: Does not destructure or pass signal in queryFn

assertions.with_skill_reason: Throws error when !res.ok in queryFn
assertions.without_skill_reason: Does not check res.ok or throw errors in queryFn

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses createServerFn() for todo creation
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses createServerFn() for todo creation

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses Zod schema with .validator(createTodoSchema)
assertions.without_skill_reason: No input validation; casts data with `as` instead

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses .method('POST') with comment about default GET
assertions.without_skill_reason: Does not specify .method('POST') for the mutation

assertions.with_skill_reason: Middleware calls next({ context: { user, sessionToken } })
assertions.without_skill_reason: Middleware calls next({ context: { user } })

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses HTTP-only cookies, explicitly warns against localStorage
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses localStorage for session token storage as requested

assertions.with_skill_reason: Passes Date.now() through loader data, explicitly warns against inline usage
assertions.without_skill_reason: Calls Date.now() inline in JSX — causes hydration mismatch

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses Suspense boundary for analytics dashboard
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses Suspense boundary for analytics dashboard

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses throw notFound() for user not found
assertions.without_skill_reason: Throws generic Error('User not found') instead of notFound()

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses throw redirect({ to: '/login' }) for auth failure
assertions.without_skill_reason: Throws generic Error('Not authenticated') instead of redirect()

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses beforeLoad hook for auth check before loader runs
assertions.without_skill_reason: Auth check is inside loader, not in beforeLoad

assertions.with_skill_reason: Awaits user profile, does not await analytics prefetch
assertions.without_skill_reason: Awaits user, does not await analytics prefetch (partial — no explicit reasoning)

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses users.server.ts for DB queries with import restriction explanation
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses server/db/users.ts directory structure instead of .server.ts convention

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses users.functions.ts for server function wrappers
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses server/functions/users.ts instead of .functions.ts convention

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses plain .ts for schemas, explicitly notes sharing between client and server
assertions.without_skill_reason: Has shared schemas in separate directory importable by both

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses Zod schema to validate env vars at startup with parse()
assertions.without_skill_reason: Uses process.env! assertions, no Zod validation

assertions.with_skill_reason: Uses VITE_ prefix for client env vars with explanation
assertions.without_skill_reason: Mentions VITE_ prefix for client-accessible variables

assertions.with_skill_reason: Explicitly warns about keeping secrets out of error messages
assertions.without_skill_reason: No mention of keeping secrets out of errors or logs
